moduleTitle: Codes and Standards, Employer-Specific Topics, and Glossary

lessons.title: Codes, Standards, and Specifications
objectives: Distinguish VT as an engineering task from VT as a technician task
Identify major US standards (e.g., ASME BPVC, AWS D1.1), European standards based on the PED, and ISO standards
Locate VT acceptance requirements within a governing code or standard
cp105Topics: 9.3 US standards (e.g., ASME BPVC, AWS D1.1)

lessons.title: Employer-Specific Applications, Techniques, and Safety
objectives: Apply employer-specific applications, techniques, and lighting practices to representative inspection scenarios
Interpret employer specifications, materials tested, and special evaluation criteria
Follow applicable safety rules during visual testing operations

lessons.title: Glossary and Scope of Direct Visual Inspection
objectives: Use the VT glossary terminology from the Nondestructive Testing Handbook, Vol. 9: Visual Testing
Explain which outline topics may be deleted when VT is limited to direct visual inspection
cp105Topics: 11.1 Refer to Chapter 13 of ASNT, 2010, Nondestructive Testing Handbook, Vol. 9: Visual Testing, third edition
11.2 Topics may be deleted if the VT is only required to perform direct visual inspection
